entries.text:
Verses 1-29

1-9. The Ark and Mercy seat: see Exodus 25:10-22.

10-16. Table of Shewbread: see Exodus 25:23-30.

17-24. The Candlestick: see Exodus 25:31-40.

25-28. The Altar of Incense: see Exodus 30:1-5. This is mentioned here in its natural position along with the other furniture of the Holy Place.

29. The Holy Oil, and the Incense: see Exodus 30:22-38.
